content: What team would you suggest that would include both Mouchette and Casiah?
mouche casiah arachne horla
if you wanna sub out horla someone like alva for the dr vuln
I'd put Arachne in every team, but I only can have 2
then put tinct for the crit
Great
So im trying out a discard team with aurita, corpos, saya, and pontos.....i dont think im using the team right...
Like when am i supposed to use what cards? Do i just use power of friendship/viscera/corpos ult whenever available?

Seeing now, Pontos is honestly not that great of a fit for that Team

- Requires Pontos to be E3
- Doesn't bring a Discard of his own into the Table, but benefits from other Awakeners doing it for him
- Deck will be plagued with not only Aurita's Glands, but Corpo's Pilots as well
- L making it exponentially more difficult to actually pull even one his Gaunts

Better off simply running a base Murphy
Pontos is E3. I've definitely been feeling the glands and pilots issue when using the team so far

But the gameplay loop for that would probably be smth like

- Saya Viscera Blossoms
- Aurita's Power of Friendship
- Corposant Exalt
- Corposant's Lightning Retribution /s
- Encounter In Pure White 
- Aurita's Exalt / OverExalt
Yeah, that sounds about right
Oh, yeah don't forget to Red Stance before then too
If I'm wrong, Ellie can correct me
I see... how would base murphy ammend the pilots and glands issue?
https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1170692781216378960/1526951897280548924/clideo_editor_19cd811d32c54b8985efda89465b24bc-ezgif.com-crop.gif
Aw man

She has no derived Cards such as Gaunts, provides Survivability that you would have otherwise gained from Pontos via her Vortex Reversal & Exalt, and on the off chance that you end up Discard-ing Divine Maiden's Birth instead of playing it (1 Arith + Shield) you will still otherwise gain permanent Tentacle Damage anyways
Alright. Will try it out
Go for it man
And lmk how it goes

hanging in vc is anyone wanna join

got e3 in 110 pulls ^_^ so went well i think

basically broke bro

i have 20k silver in the stash!

plus i got some silver for those chapter end packs
that give a ton of energy

who are budget teammates for Saya Sanga? I don't have Salv and Vortice has Murphy/Celeste custody, aiming for ~A4

What I've done 

Dreams of Medicine / April Tribute 
- Crit Rate 1, 2, 3
- Death Resistance 5, 6
- any remaining Stat 4
- target Crit Rate > Death Resistance > Crit Damage
Could also just do both, Monthly Pass is relatively affordable at 300 a pop

embeds.title: The Hidden Science of Morimens Team Building
embeds.description:
Welcome back to Part 2 of my Beginner Guide Series, in this video im covering the different Realms in Morimens and how to build competent Teams!

Thumbnail Credit: https://x.com/annaxxe_

---------------------------------------------------------------

Time Stamps

0:00 - 0:32 - Intro
0:33 - 7:46 -

content: pinging yourself
much to think about
very
Bruh I hard pitied thrice in a row no way
40k gems down the drain for 1x ghelot 2x corpo I'm not even pulling for Pollux at this rate
And 1 caecus 2 (?) celeste, 1 faint, 1 uvhash and 1 faros omgggg

Yeah i don't know what i'm doing at all. Do i need to level characters above 60 or something? Corpo, aurita, saya, and pontos/murphy are all e3. Do i need to raise corpo's soulforge to max or just skills past 3 in general? Do i need to roll more substats on all covenants before taking on madness difficulty stuff?
Could be Soulforge & Skill Levels, could also depend on which Covenants & WoDs that you're running as well
This is what I typically use for my Team
For the Support, I just pick up a whaled out Corpo
what madness difficulty are you doing
train?

I Pontos event. Forest on Madness. Gave up and switched to Mouchette team so Mouchette could introduce the boss's face to her axe. I dare not try the train yet. I'm at the point where i'd like to better understand how to use other team comps and being able to benefit from cycling cards in my hand sounded fun.
mhm not sure tbh
but getting skills past lvl3 is for sure recommended
atleast the important ones
Yeah, for instance Saya's Viscera
Having more Awakener Levels are always good too

For discard, i think just saya's 0-cost is at 6 (mainly because i love seeing mouchette go brrt). So any suggestions for progression path are more than welcome. Ive seen some of the guides but it's like...the order of things that messes with my train of thought
Can you send your Team?
Screenshot or?
screenshot of ur team and ur roster
Ss ingame would probably be the easiest
Could also just ss from skeydb too
But that doesn't necessarily show the levels of your individual Skills, Exalt and Soulforge
Before i started making changes suggested earlier i tried using that teambuilder thing and got this....
You should use Encounter In Pure White
Aurita's Treasure is not very useful for Discard
I did swap to that after. Still ran into issues on the same stage. Tried to see some replays but it's a bit too quick for me to fully comprehend what's going on
do you have blade of the titan
Yes. At +12
also the reason youre struggeling in madness
is your soulforges
theyre incredibly low
Oh, yeah you're right
Ah i heard in a vid i wanted soulforge at 1 minimum so i didnt realize that was a major issue....
None are even 5
Dont remember the vid tbh
You do want Soulforge Level 1 at minimum, but you'd ideally want to have Level 5 at the very least
Because if it's low Level, you wouldn't be receiving much Benefits

give corpo blade + horla wheel/miryam wheel/dearest friend
i would still play either aurita OR ponto
pontos wants twisted twins white (interludes) and crit damage wheels so his sig + crit damage SR
aurita wants crimson pulse (badges shop) and jenkins wheel but if you dont have it rewinding time is fine + crit chance SR
id slot in murphy and give her keyflare covenant and wheels
saya id put on burial, wheels are fine
corpo wants ominous and lightning maxxed (maybe exalt idr the upgrades) , pontos wants exalt, X cost and 2 cost maxxed, aurita wants glands maxxed, murphy wants her 0 and 3 cost maxxed, saya is fine
